group_1.narration: "Even when I only had@dreams about being attacked,@there were still plenty of things@I could write about in my diary."

"I can pick up on the other party's@occupation and circumstances@not just from any unique features they have,@but also any minor worries of theirs.@If the victim knows them,@the perpetrator's name@pops into my head as well."
"One day, I happened to see a news report@about an incident that was an identical match@for a dream I'd had."
"I'd had a nagging feeling about it,@but my nightmares were things@that had happened to people in real life."
"A real person actually had to go@through what I felt in my dreams..."
"However, after I'd started keeping a diary@of the horrible dreams I had every night,@they gradually decreased in frequency."
"Why this started happening,@I hadn't the foggiest.@But it was clear that@I'd begun to improve since I met Yuu."
"It was all thanks to her..."
"Yuu always knows how to respond."
"When I grumbled about@not being able to trust anyone,@she just said 'Yeah, that's fair'."
"When I told her that she looked scary,@she sat down with a sheet over her head."
"When I was lamenting that@I didn't have the skills to live alone,@she got curious and asked@'Is that because you don't want to?@Or do you just not know how yet?'"
"She understands me."

group_1.textLeft: I wish I could be free.

group_1.textRight: Are you not?

group_1.textLeft: As long as I'm stuck in this orphanage, I can't@go anywhere.

group_1.textRight: What a pain, what a pain.

group_1.textLeft: I want you to get me out of here...
...so that I never have to lie again.

group_1.textRight: Sure thing! Let's go to all kinds of different places@together, okay?
Even if you forget...
...I'll tell you over and over that you're free.

group_1.narration: "That day...@Yuu killed everyone in the facility."

group_1.textLeft: You didn't have to go that far...

group_1.textRight: I tried explaining everything to them nicely,@but they didn't listen at all, okay?
They were just like "we need Shii to do this@for us."
They really didn't seem to care how much@they were making you suffer.
That's why I thought it was fine. You really didn't@seem to want this, either.

group_1.textLeft: On the surface, they seemed kind...
...but they weren't good people by any stretch@of the imagination...
Murdering them is pointless, though...

group_1.textRight: That's not true.
You haven't been having as many scary dreams@lately, right?
So maybe if we kill all of the bad guys...
...that'll solve your problem?

group_1.textLeft: Wait, so the people I saw in my dreams...@Don't tell me you...

group_1.narration: "I hadn't thought about it much until that point."
"I'd shrugged it off under the assumption@that I must've grown stronger."
"Why did I never have the nightmares@I wrote down in my diary again?@Why does Yuu go out every night?"

group_1.textRight: I went to ask some bad guys...
...if they could please stop showing up in your@dreams...
...but a bunch of them pulled knives and stuff@on me, right?
Then they died while I was trying to tell them@to cut it out.
And you know what?
After this happened a few times, I noticed@that the people I killed by accident...
...were the only ones you stopped writing about@in your diary.

group_1.narration: "My nightmares were resolved@by Yuu killing the 'bad guys'."
"I found hope in that."
"Yuu saw how effective this remedy was for me,@and got convinced that she should do the same@to the people at the orphanage."

group_1.textLeft: Wh...why didn't you tell me?

group_1.textRight: Because I thought you'd be worried about, like...
...rules and the law and stuff.

group_1.textLeft: Are we not human beings? The only thing that@can judge humans is the law.

group_1.textRight: I wasn't trying to play judge, though?
I tried to ask them politely to stop making you@suffer...
...and then I ended up just killing them?

group_1.textLeft: I do want relief, and I want to be saved, but even@if those wishes are granted...
...there's no point if you go about it@the wrong way.

group_1.textRight: There is still a point.
It helps ease your suffering, even just a little bit.

group_1.textLeft: Human beings shouldn't act on impulse.
Even if our instincts tell us that something is@right...
...we have to consider whether or not that's true!
Isn't our ability to think what makes us human?!

group_1.textRight: Humans don't think, do they?@[chara:390100:lipSynch_0][wait:1.0][chara:390100:lipSynch_1]"Th-e brain is no-t a think-ing pl-a-ce."

group_1.textLeft: Huh?

group_1.textRight: Our personalities, our thoughts— they're nothing@more than the screams of cells...
...that keep falling into the bottomless voids@of our hearts.
Thoughts don't give birth to emotions...
...they just exist to excuse what we feel,@or something?
I have no idea.
I just know that I wanted to help you more than@those people.
That's why I chose to do that.
I wonder if the people you live through in your@dreams...
...want someone to save them, too?
Shii and somebody in her dreams who needs@help...
...or a person who can't give up hurting others.
Which would you pick, Shii?

group_1.textLeft: I...I can't choose myself. There's no reason to@make a decision like that.

group_1.textRight: Even if there isn't, I can't stand seeing you in@pain, you know?
Whether it's "right" or not, I'll help who I wanna@help.
And you might not be able to pick a side,@but I'll always choose you, Shii.
Also!
If you're suffering, that means that someone@else is, too.
You could definitely justify it with that,@couldn't you?

group_1.textLeft: ...[wait:1.0][chara:390201:cheek_0][chara:390201:face_mtn_ex_001.exp3.json:motion_0:eyeClose_0][chara:390201:lipSynch_1]Yuu.
Witch Labyrinths are places that normal humans@can't find, right?

group_1.textRight: Yeah, why?

group_1.textLeft: ...Then we should go and dispose of the@orphanage staff in one of those.
